TestCase z20Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_elements = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_elements, t1.elements, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.elements = follow_case_elements;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code to ensure there are at least 2 elements for rotation
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        // Not enough elements to perform rotation, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation: rotate subarray [a,b] left by 1 (move element at a to position b)
    // Here we define a = 0 and b = follow_case.n - 1 (rotate the whole array)
    int a = 0;
    int b = follow_case.n - 1;
    // Ensure indices are within bounds (they are by construction)
    double temp = follow_case.elements[a];
    for (int i = a; i < b; ++i) {
        follow_case.elements[i] = follow_case.elements[i + 1];
    }
    follow_case.elements[b] = temp;
    
    return follow_case;
}
